package rulecoverage

func PositiveRuntimeGomaxprocsPerRequest() string {
    ruleID := "runtime_gomaxprocs_per_request"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`runtime.GOMAXPROCS(...)` on request paths."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
